label: The Basalt Arsenal
description: The Basalt Arsenal operates as a regulated weapon shop set into Brineshade Terminator City’s fused basalt platforms, its façade recessed behind shuttered arcades to blunt Saltharrow’s hard white glare. Interior walls are faced with salt-cemented stone and matte light-baffle panels, creating a controlled, low-reflectance showroom that preserves optical clarity. Racked display bays and sealed inspection alcoves line the perimeter, while a central counter anchors ledgers, measures, and standardized fittings. The structure’s joints and shelving are visibly overbuilt with stress bracing suited to the city’s recorded tidal strains and gravitic gradients.
